lessons.title: Class Methods 🎩
lessons.description: Methods that belong strictly to the Blueprint, not the Object.

lessons.title: Class Variables 🗃️
lessons.description: Global data that is seamlessly shared across all instances.

lessons.title: Inheritance 🧬
lessons.description: Pass genes and behaviors from an overarching parent down to children.

lessons.title: Overriding and Super 🦸
lessons.description: Modify inherited methods and elegantly summon parent code using super.

lessons.title: Modules and Mixins 🧩
lessons.description: Share behaviors horizontally across unrelated classes.
